ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the state belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the state */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Annual growth rate of the state's economy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the industry belongs to (e.g., primary, secondary, tertiary) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the industry */,
  "average_salary" REAL /* Average salary in the industry */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Total number of employees in the industry */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Annual growth rate of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "establishments" (
  "establishment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each establishment */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the establishment is located */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the establishment belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of establishments in the industry and state */,
  "average_employee_count" REAL /* Average number of employees per establishment */,
  "average_revenue_per_employee" REAL /* Average revenue per employee */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Annual growth rate of the number of establishments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("establishment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_establishments_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_establishments_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the employment is located */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the employment belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate in the industry and state */,
  "total_employees" INTEGER /* Total number of employees in the industry and state */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the industry and state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenue" (
  "revenue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the revenue is generated */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the revenue belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the industry and state */,
  "profit_margin" REAL /* Profit margin of the industry and state */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Annual growth rate of the revenue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revenue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate for the year */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* GDP growth rate for the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sector */,
  "average_salary" REAL /* Average salary in the sector */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Total number of employees in the sector */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Annual growth rate of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, policymaker) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state being accessed */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry being accessed */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_sector_map" (
  "industry_sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry-sector mapping */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industry_sector_map_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industry_sector_map_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "establishment_year_map" (
  "establishment_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each establishment-year mapping */,
  "establishment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the establishment */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("establishment_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_establishment_year_map_establishment_id FOREIGN KEY ("establishment_id") REFERENCES establishments ("establishment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_establishment_year_map_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenue_year_map" (
  "revenue_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue-year mapping */,
  "revenue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the revenue */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revenue_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_year_map_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_year_map_revenue_id FOREIGN KEY ("revenue_id") REFERENCES revenue ("revenue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_year_map" (
  "employment_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment-year mapping */,
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employment */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_year_map_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_year_map_employment_id FOREIGN KEY ("employment_id") REFERENCES employment ("employment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_state_map" (
  "industry_state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry-state mapping */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industry_state_map_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industry_state_map_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector_year_map" (
  "sector_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector-year mapping */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sector_year_map_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sector_year_map_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)
